text:
Problem solved ! The attached file is a new patch with the corrections to solve tinderbox build errors.

Best regards

Steven Kreuzer wrote:
> This seems to be bombing in my tinderbox. Can you review the attached 
> log and make any necessary changes.
> 
> Thanks
>
